description: r4t — Roster For Teams. Namespace node: bind a prefix with `a8s namespace <prefix> <node>` and tell <prefix> — external mail always enters at the roster leader. Roster in <root>/ROSTER.md; rig config out-of-repo at ~/.config/r4t/rigs.json (append --roster / --harness-config to override). The idle invoke resolves the sole ~/.config/r4t team; with multiple teams, copy this file per node and append "--node", "<prefix>" to the IDLE invoke only (dispatch derives the node from --to and rejects --node).

prompts._comment: Optional sparse overrides of r4t's built-in prompt text, by key (see apps/r4t/docs/org.md and plans/COMMS-SPEC.md §6). Substitution fields: {name}, {node}, {workplace}, {creator}, {thread}. Omit this whole object to use every default.
